readme:
# gflags

The gflags package contains a C++ library that implements commandline flags processing

## Installation

Add to your `dfetch.yaml`:

```yaml
projects:
  - name: ext/gflags
    url: https://github.com/gflags/gflags
    tag: v2.2.2
```

## Usage

After running `dfetch update`, the library will be available at `ext/gflags/`.
